name: smarttrade-africa
description: SmartTrade Africa — secure e-commerce platform monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm i && npm i --prefix smarttrade/backend && npm i --prefix smarttrade/frontend && npm i --prefix smarttrade/shared
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix smarttrade/backend" "npm run dev --prefix smarttrade/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix smarttrade/shared && npm run build --prefix smarttrade/backend && npm run build --prefix smarttrade/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix smarttrade/backend && npm run lint --prefix smarttrade/frontend
